case_title: LOKITZ, MAURICE VS BROOK FURNITURE RENTAL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOKITZ, MAURICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROOK FURNITURE RENTAL $417.68 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $469.68, THIS JUDGEMENT LIMITS THE APPLICATION OF SECTIONS 13 AND/OR SECTION 14 OF THE BROOK FURNITURE RENTAL LEASE AGREEMENT TO AVOID AN UNCONSCIONABLE RESULT PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA CIVIL CODE 1670.5(A). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
